steps.title: Use the naming goal
steps.content: The student wants to explain the origin of the species' name, so the answer must connect Mansourasaurus to the team from Mansoura University. Merely giving the species' age, location, or discovery date is not enough.

steps.title: Require the origin link
steps.content: A gives the discovery year and age but not the reason for the name. B only says the species was named Mansourasaurus. C names the discoverers but does not connect the name to Mansoura University. The sentence that explains the name's connection to the discovering team best meets the goal. The answer is D.
